local.name: DEFAULT_CONTROL_URL
local.signature: pub const DEFAULT_CONTROL_URL: &str = "controlplane.tailscale.com";

local.name: FUNNEL_PORTS
local.signature: pub const FUNNEL_PORTS: &[u16];

local.name: CertError
local.signature: pub enum CertError { NotEnabled(String), AcmeClientUnavailable(String), Acme(String), CacheInvalid(String, String), Io(Error), }

local.name: ConflictMode
local.signature: pub enum ConflictMode { Skip, Overwrite, Rename, }

local.name: FunnelError
local.signature: pub enum FunnelError { HttpsNotEnabled, NotEnabled, PortNotAllowed(u16), }

local.name: InMemoryClientError
local.signature: pub enum InMemoryClientError { Json(String), Connect(String), AccessDenied(String), PreconditionsFailed(String), HttpStatus(u16), }

local.name: ServeError
local.signature: pub enum ServeError { EmptyHandler, BadBackend(String), BackendConnectTimeout, BackendConnect(String), NoCertProvider, Tls(String), Io(Error), Netstack(NetstackError), }

local.name: ServiceError
local.signature: pub enum ServiceError { InvalidServiceName(String), NoVipAddrs(String), NoV4VipAddrs(String), Netstack(NetstackError), Other(String), }

local.name: ServiceMode
local.signature: pub enum ServiceMode { Tcp(TcpServiceMode), Http(HttpServiceMode), }

local.name: ServiceStream
local.signature: pub enum ServiceStream { Plain(NetstackStream), WithProxy { prefix: Vec<u8>, prefix_pos: usize, inner: NetstackStream, }, Tls(TlsStream<NetstackStream>), TlsWithProxy { prefix: Vec<u8>, prefix_pos: usize, inner: TlsStream<NetstackStream>, }, }

local.name: SocksAddr
local.signature: pub enum SocksAddr { Ipv4 { addr: Ipv4Addr, port: u16, }, Ipv6 { addr: Ipv6Addr, port: u16, }, Domain { name: String, port: u16, }, }

local.name: StateError
local.signature: pub enum StateError { Io(Error), Json(Error), }

local.name: TaildropError
local.signature: pub enum TaildropError { NotEnabled, InvalidFileName(String), FileExists(String), FileNotFound(String), FileTooLarge { size: u64, max: u64, }, Io(Error), }

local.name: TlsError
local.signature: pub enum TlsError { CertGen(Error), Rustls(String), Netstack(NetstackError), Io(Error), }

local.name: TsnetError
local.signature: pub enum TsnetError { Show 32 variants AlreadyUp, NotUp, Builder(String), State(StateError), LogId(LogIdError), Register(RegisterError), MapStream(StreamMapError), InvalidNetmap(String), Magicsock(MagicsockError), Netstack(NetstackError), Wg(WgError), AuthRequired(String), IdentityFederation(String), Io(Error), Json(Error), HostnameNotFound(String), ExitNodeNotFound(String), NotExitCapable(String), Derp(DerpError), Netcheck(NetcheckError), Netlog(NetlogError), Tun(TunError), NotAvailableInTunMode, NotSupported(String), TailnetLock(String), Extension(String), ShutdownIncomplete(String), MapTimeout, Tls(TlsError), Serve(ServeError), Funnel(FunnelError), Service(ServiceError), }

local.name: localapi::DaemonCommand
local.signature: pub enum DaemonCommand { Start { auth_key: Option<String>, }, LoginInteractive, Down { completion: Arc<DownCompletion>, }, Logout, Shutdown, ReloadConfig, SwitchProfile(String), }
